wine_cellar.title: Brew 8 different Vinery wines — collect the full wine range (26 wines available in the mod)

brewin_ale.title: Brew a Brewin & Chewin temperature ale — pair it with the Eiswein for the feast table

subtitle.text: A cellar is a civilization's belief in the future. You have to build it in the present for people who aren't born yet.

description: Vinery's 26 wines cover a wide range of effects:
Combat buffs, healing, speed, resistance, saturation.
Each wine requires different grape varieties and fermentation conditions.
Brewin & Chewin adds ales and fermented drinks:
The temperature system affects drink potency.
Sweet Berry Jam is the base for several recipes.
The ale pairs with the wine for complete beverage coverage.
Pre-combat healing. Post-combat recovery. Everyday saturation.
This is the infrastructure of a civilization that intends to continue.
